article_items.title: Technical deep dive: AgentCore payments and innovation in agentic commerce | Amazon Web Services
article_items.description: Amazon Bedrock AgentCore payments is now available in preview, it provides instant payments to paid external services with no manual billing setup per provider, stablecoin support for cost-effective microtransactions that make sub-cent transactions economically viable, and configurable spending guardrails that give you fine-grained control over agent budgets and transaction limits. In this post, we walk you through a technical deep dive of AgentCore payments.
article_items.excerpt: Amazon Bedrock AgentCore payments is now available in preview, it provides instant payments to paid external services with no manual billing setup per provider, stablecoin support for cost-effective microtransactions that make sub-cent transactions economically viable, and configurable spending guardrails that give you fine-grained control over agent budgets and transaction limits. In this post, we walk you through a technical deep dive of AgentCore payments.

article_items.title: Mistral AI Taps Legal Sector With Harvey Partnership
article_items.description: Mistral AI Taps Legal Sector With Harvey Partnership
article_items.excerpt: Mistral AI Taps Legal Sector With Harvey Partnership
article_items.summary: Mistral AI Taps Legal Sector With Harvey Partnership The generative AI vendor is expanding into the legal industry in a move reminiscent of Anthropic’s legal AI deals. “[This makes] them especially relevant for legal teams working across large document sets, jurisdictions, and languages.” The launch follows the opening of Harvey’s Paris office, as part of its expansion across Europe that includes offices in Dublin, London, Madrid, and Munich. The practical impact: Partnering with Mistral, the San Francisco-based vendor, said, will enable it to better serve local customers by adhering to local requirements and model preferences. Under the agreement, revealed on Tuesday, Mistral’s models will be added to Harvey ’s platform, which provides legal teams with a range of AI models to assist across areas such as compliance, litigation and contract analysis. article_items.title: OpenRouter more than doubles valuation to $1.3B in a year | TechCrunch
article_items.description: OpenRouter has raised a $113 million Series B led by CapitalG. Its 5x growth in usage over six months indicates the multi-AI-model future is here.

article_items.summary: OpenRouter has raised a $113 million Series B led by CapitalG. More from TechCrunch OpenRouter more than doubles valuation to $1.3B in a year Popular AI gateway maker OpenRouter , founded in 2023, has raised a hefty $113 million Series B led by CapitalG, the growth venture fund of Google parent company Alphabet. That’s a 5x increase from the 5 trillion tokens it was processing per week just six months ago.
Since then, AI work has shifted from training to inference to, now, agents.
It claims 8 million global users and 100 trillion tokens processed per month, or about 25 trillion per week.
rag_angles: what changes for developers or users
what the launch makes easier, faster, cheaper, or more accessible
what limitation or rollout detail readers should watch next
what the capability unlocks
rag_rules: Lead with the actual product, model, or API name.
Explain what changed before explaining why it matters.
Anchor credibility with dates, model names, pricing, availability, benchmarks, regions, or partners when the source provides them.
Separate proven capability from claimed capability.
